title: Nav/GNC Technical Note: gimbal stabilisation technology

# Nav/GNC Technical Note: gimbal stabilisation technology

**Attendees:** Priya Nair, Nina Schulz, Sam Dreher, Marcus Thaine

## Summary

This page covers the gimbal stabilisation technology for the Nav/GNC subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.

## Actions

- Follow-up with Aisha Mbeki on outstanding items.
